title: 3. Take a squared paper of size 15 cm × 15 cm and paste it on a coloured chart paper.
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 3. Take a squared paper of size 15 cm × 15 cm and paste it on a coloured chart paper.
objective:
To draw a cumulative frequency curve
(or an ogive) of more than type.
Coloured chart paper, ruler, squared
paper, sketch pens, cellotape,
cutter, adhesive.
procedure:
1. Collect data on heights of students of your school and make a frequency
distribution table as given below :
Height   a-b   b-c   c-d   d-e   e-f
Frequency   f   1   f   2   f   3   f   4   f   5
2. Form a cumulative frequency table of more than type from the above data as
given below:
discussion:
This ogive can be used to find median of the data.
Mathematics   171
